titleStmt.title: SII 18.144: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 144. (B.K. No. 136 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Pratāpa-chakravarti Jagadēkamalladēva is dated in the 2nd year of his reign, Siddhārthi, Kārtika śu • • • The tithi and the week-day are lost. The available details correspond to A.D. 1139, October-November.
It records a grant of taxes on the sale of certain food-grains, for the worship and offerings of the god Chiddēśvaradēva made by certain Seṭṭi-Guttas. The gift was entrusted to Saṅka[rā?]si-Jīya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśca . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁ
bicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarā
rambha(ṁ) mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatu pratāpacakra
vartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarā
bhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
© svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā maṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ jagadēkamalla
dēvara kaṭṭidalagu kumāraṁ da saru . svasti śrī
matu pratāpacakravartti da 2 neya siddhā
rttisaṁvatsarada kārtthika su vāradaṁdu
śrīmatu rājadhāni taḷada seṭṭigu
tta dhalliseṭṭiyanākise bammiseṭṭiyu
seṭṭi hōliseṭṭiyu cala vīciseṭṭiyu
miṇḍaguddhali nāgiseṭṭiyu ddhiseṭṭiyu
saṁkara rāmiseṭṭiyu dhara seṭṭiyu maha nā
giseṭṭiyu malliseṭṭiyu yinti gi Ainūrvvaru
nāḍu nakaramuṁ dēsiyu śrīciddēsvaradēvara nityanivēdya
caitrapaiyitra Alliya tapōdha ra jīyara maga saṁka
sijīyara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa dharmma mā
rida jōḷa davasadhānyavāvudādaḍaṁ māṟidavaralli poṁge mā
1 māṟugoṁḍavaralli poṁge ḷiyalu nōḍikoṁbaru
dharmmava pratipāḷisidavargge prayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra
tīrtthagaḷalu voṁdu kōṭi kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ
dalu kaṭṭisi vēdapāraga bhrāṁbhargge dānada phala savva The remaining few lines are lost.
Digital edition of SII 18.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
